zh.Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United: 美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lavina Clark於1777年2月13日出生在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農時，她的父親Gershom Clark23歲，母親Levinah Wright23歲。她於1795年12月3日與John Gleason Wheelock在美國佛蒙特州溫莎女爵維亞黑斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她於1850年住在美國紐約州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特。她去世於1853年9月15日在美國紐約州艾利蘭卡斯特包曼斯維爾享年76歲，埋葬在美國紐約州艾利布費阿洛科華士 勞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lavina Clark于1777年2月13日出生在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農时，她的父亲Gershom Clark23岁，母亲Levinah Wright23岁。她于1795年12月3日与John Gleason Wheelock在美国佛蒙特州溫莎女爵維亞黑斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她于1850年住在美国纽约州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特。她去世于1853年9月15日在美国纽约州艾利蘭卡斯特包曼斯維爾享年76岁，埋葬在美国纽约州艾利布費阿洛科華士 勞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Clark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

variants.name: Clarke
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clerk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Jacques.
Americanized form of French   Clerc   and perhaps also of the Dutch and Flemish cognates   De Klerk   and   De Clerck   or of variants of these names. Compare   Clark   3.

variants.name: Clerkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Brendan, Dympna, Seamus.

Irish (Monaghan): from an Irish pet form of English clerk ‘cleric’ (Irish cléireach), see Clark . Alternatively, an Anglicized form of Ó Cléireacháin, ‘descendant of little cleric’, an Irish diminutive of the word. See also McClurkin , an Antrim surname from Mac Cléirchín ‘son of little cleric’.

variants.name: Calarco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Carmelo, Fausto, Nunziato, Salvatore.
Italian (southern): probably a nickname derived from Greek kalē archē ‘good beginning’. Compare Clark 4.

variants.name: Clerc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Odette, Sebastien, Serge.

French: occupational or status name for a member of a minor religious order or for a scholar, Old French clerc, from Late Latin clericus, from Greek klērikos, a derivative of klēros ‘inheritance, legacy’, with reference to the priestly tribe of Levites (see Levy ) ‘whose inheritance was the Lord’. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established. In the Middle Ages it was virtually only members of religious orders who learned to read and write, so that the term clerc later came to denote any literate man, a scholar (hence its modern meaning ‘scribe, secretary’ or ‘clerk’). Compare Leclerc .

variants.name: Clarkson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): patronymic from   Clark  .

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.

historicEvents.title: British Forces Capture Fort Griswold
historicEvents.description: The capture of Fort Griswold was the final act of treason that Benedict Arnold committed. This would be a British victory. On the American side 85 were killed, 35 wounded and paroled, 28 taken prisoner, 13 escaped, and 1 twelve year old was captured and released.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of the Battle of Groton and The Burning of New London

historicEvents.title: Albany is Named Capital of New York
historicEvents.description: Albany became the capital of New York in 1797. Albany is the oldest continuous settlement of the original 13 colonies.

historicEvents.title: Brass is Discovered
historicEvents.description: "In 1802, brass was identified in Waterbury, Connecticut. This gave the city the nickname ""The Brass City."" Brass dominated the city and helped to create the city. The motto of the city is Quid Aere Perennius, which means What is more lasting than brass? in Latin."
historicEvents.urlTitle: Connecticut History.Org- Birth of the Brass Valley

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: Remember the Alamo
historicEvents.description: Being a monumental event in the Texas Revolution, The Battle of the Alamo was a thirteen-day battle at the Alamo Mission near San Antonio. In the early morning of the final battle, the Mexican Army advanced on the Alamo. Quickly being overrun, the Texian Soldiers quickly withdrew inside the building. The battle has often been overshadowed by events from the Mexican–American War, But the Alamo gradually became known as a national battle site and later named an official Texas State Shrine.

en.lifeSummary: When Lavina Clark was born on 13 February 1777, in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United States, her father, Gershom Clark, was 23 and her mother, Levinah Wright, was 23. She married John Gleason Wheelock on 3 December 1795, in Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She lived in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, United States in 1850. She died on 15 September 1853, in Bowmansville, Lancaster, Erie, New York, United States, at the age of 76, and was buried in Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, New York, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lavina Clark est née le 13 février 1777, à Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, Gershom Clark, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Levinah Wright, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Gleason Wheelock le 3 décembre 1795, à Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle a vécu à Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, États-Unis en 1850. Elle est décédée le 15 septembre 1853, à Bowmansville, Lancaster, Erie, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, New York, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lavina Clark am 13. Februar 1777 in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gershom Clark 23 und ihre Mutter Levinah Wright 23. Sie hat am 3. Dezember 1795 in Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, Vereinigte Staaten John Gleason Wheelock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1850 hat sie in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 15. September 1853 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Bowmansville, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lavina Clark è nata il il 13 febbraio 1777 nel Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Gershom Clark, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Levinah Wright, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John Gleason Wheelock il 3 dicembre 1795, nel Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1850. Morì il 15 settembre 1853, nel Bowmansville, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, New York, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lavina Clarkが1777年2月13日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンレバノンで生まれた時，父Gershom Clarkは23歳，母Levinah Wrightは23歳であった。1795年12月3日にアメリカ合衆国バーモント州ウィンドソルウエアスエルスフィールドでJohn Gleason Wheelockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーランカスターランカスターに住んでいた。彼女は1853年9月15日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーランカスターボウマンスヴィルで76歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーブファロフォーエスト ラウン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Bowmansville, Erie, New York, United Sta: 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 랭커스터 보우먼스빌

ko.Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United: 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌
ko.lifeSummary: Lavina Clark(이)가 1777년 2월 13일 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gershom Clark(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Levinah Wright(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1795년 12월 3일 미국 버몬트 주 윈드소르 웨더스필드에서 John Gleason Wheelock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 랭커스터 랭커스터에서 살았다. 그녀는 1853년 9월 15일 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 랭커스터 보우먼스빌에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 버팔로 포레스트 로 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lavina Clark nasceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1777, em Lebanon, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Gershom Clark, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Levinah Wright, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Gleason Wheelock em 3 de dezembro de 1795, em Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermonte, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela viveu em Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América em 1850. Ela faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1853, em Bowmansville, Lancaster, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lavina Clark родилась 13 февраля 1777 г. в местности лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Gershom Clark было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Levinah Wright, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Gleason Wheelock 3 декабря 1795 г. в местности витирсфиелд, виндзор, Вермонт, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она жила в местности ланкастир, ланкастир, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году. Она умерла 15 сентября 1853 г. в местности боумансвилл, ланкастир, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности форест лавн кеметири, буффалоу, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты.
